title: Choclatey DEPRECATED
description: This is a reimagining of vanillia A modpack with optimization and quality of life in mind, This modpack is the same idea, However My ideals for that modpack eventually differed from the owner, so I left the project and with permission made this!
body:
This is a reimagining of vanillia A modpack with optimization and quality of life in mind, This modpack is the same idea, However My ideals for that modpack eventually differed from the owner, so I left the project and with permission made this!

How do i install this without modrinth
Go to our site. [Website](https://gitlab.com/drakosoldier298/choclatey) , hit download as zip and drop it into [PrismLauncher](https://prismlauncher.org/). Or [Multimc](https://multimc.org/) for now you can only install it with [PrismLauncher](https://prismlauncher.org/). Or [Multimc](https://multimc.org/)  This is because it runs on Packwiz Which allows me to automatically update mods remotely, meaning no need for you to ever reinstall a mod or check for mod updates yourself! There is currently no way to install it on Curseforge launcher,ATLauncher, or the default launcher, Support for the default launcher is coming soon! tm
